# ML/AI Engineer Foundations: Final Portfolio (Steam Game Success Analysis)

## Project Overview
Analyzing what factors contribute to a Steam game's success by examining the relationship between game characteristics (genre, price, release timing) and success metrics (ratings, player counts, reviews).

## Project Goals
- Identify which genres perform best on Steam
- Determine optimal pricing strategies
- Analyze impact of release timing on game success
- Provide actionable insights for indie game developers

## Dataset
**Source:** [Kaggle - Steam Games Dataset] (https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/fronkongames/steam-games-dataset?resource=download)
**Features:** Genre, Price, Release Date, User Ratings, Player Counts, Developer, etc.

## Analysis Plan
1. Data collection and loading
2. Data cleaning and preprocessing
3. Exploratory data analysis
4. Visualization and insights
5. Results and conclusions

## Technologies Used
- Python 3.x
- Pandas
- NumPy
- Matplotlib/Seaborn
- Jupyter Notebook

## Project Status
🚧 In Progress - Currently in project scoping phase
